expectations.text: Calls settings.setIncludeImage(true, for: .croppedDocument) — required for frontReviewImage to be populated
Does NOT use AamvaBarcodeVerifier or DataConsistencyVerifier — verification is settings-driven
expectations.evidence: No import or reference to AamvaBarcodeVerifier or DataConsistencyVerifier anywhere in the file

expectations.text: Handles .inconsistentData, .forgedAamvaBarcode, and .documentExpired in didReject with distinct messages
expectations.evidence: Lines 86-99: separate case branches for .inconsistentData (Constants.Message.inconsistentData), .forgedAamvaBarcode (Constants.Message.forgedBarcode), and .documentExpired (Constants.Message.expired), each with a distinct message string

expectations.text: Uses idCapture.reset() when re-enabling capture after showing the verification result (or correctly re-enables isEnabled)
expectations.evidence: Code consistently sets idCapture.isEnabled = true in every completion handler, which satisfies the 'or correctly re-enables isEnabled' condition.
